programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Shrinks Don't Talk and Kids Don't Sing
programme.desc: Mark adjusts to his first day of college as a commuter student; Becky gets into a disagreement with Beverly Rose's music teacher over a song.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: When Sisters Collide and the Return of the Grifters
programme.desc: Darlene crashes Mark's college trivia night to prove how smart she is; Neville finds out the money he loaned Dan was used for something other than its intended purpose.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Sheldon design an experiment -- as a joke -- to make participants fall in love; Howard and Bernadette get into trouble at the airport.
